name: engine_list
_note: engine_list (server.js MACROS path) is a NON-COLLIDING alias for the understanding-engine list (und.listUnderstandings → {ok, rows}). It exists because the bare 'understanding.list' name is shadowed for /api/lens/run by the notes-substrate LENS_ACTION (server/domains/understanding.js, returns {result:{notes}}), which the dispatcher prefers — so the lens's engine-facing Browse tab could not reach the engine list under the bare name. The notes tab keeps 'list'; the Browse tab calls 'engine_list'. listUnderstandings has its own try/catch and returns [] on any db error, so the result is always {ok:true, rows:[...]}; with no understandings seeded the assassin sees ok:true + empty rows (never no_db).
